title: JDK's Mob Grinding Utilities 2
description: New ways to make mob farms
body:
## JDK's Mob Grinding Utilities is a mod designed to make mob farming more enjoyable and efficient by adding new blocks and items 


**_Required [JDK's Utilities Core 2](https://modrinth.com/mod/jdk-core) v1.0c_**

## You can see all the content below ⏬

![blocks and items](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/049a9833c57e0f13147e0bcd05e3ba3fa58c3734.png)

(mob grinder and monster bait must be powered by redstone)

**- Blocks:**

Soul Spawner. (spawns mobs whose soul is inside it)

Mob Grinder. (grinds mobs >:3)

Monster Bait. (mobs move towards it when soul vial is inside)

Conveyor. (moves mobs, players & items)

Soul Glass. (deco)

**- Items:**

Soularium Dagger. (used for gaining soul)

Soul Vial. (used to store soul)

**- Modules: ~~(descriptions in tooltips)~~**

Luck Modules. (adds to mob grinder chance to double the loot)

Spawn Rate Modules. (soul spawner can spawn more mobs)

**(Free use for modpacks)**
